descriptionEn: Meaning of name unknown. The son of Zorobabel or Zerubbabel and the father of Eliakim, listed in Matthew's genealogy of Jesus Christ.

verses.line: And Zorobabel begat Abiud; and Abiud begat Eliakim; and Eliakim begat Azor;

images.caption: And Zorobabel begat Abiud; and Abiud begat Eliakim; and Eliakim begat Azor; (Matthew 1:13)
